title: Vixit Boost
description: A highly optimized Minecraft modpack created to increase performance and improve the overall play experience.
body:
# **About Vixit Boost**
**Vixit Boost** is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack that improves frame rates, lowers lag, and makes gameplay smoother without sacrificing the game’s visual quality.

![Subscribe To VixitPlays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d526e7c0a9f1f414f38aef52c7fd159843d0d84.jpeg)
# **Key Features:**
- **High Performance Optimization:**

Vixit Boost is built with powerful optimization mods such as Sodium, Lithium, and ImmediatelyFast, helping your game run faster by improving FPS, reducing lag, and making chunk loading much more efficient.

- **Enhanced Graphics:**

With Iris Shaders support, Vixit Boost allows you to enjoy beautiful lighting, realistic shadows, and improved visual effects that make your Minecraft world feel more alive and immersive.

- **Smart Resource Usage:**

Mods like Dynamic FPS, More Culling, and Entity Culling reduce unnecessary rendering and background processing, helping your system use fewer resources while keeping gameplay smooth.

- **Improved Stability:**

Vixit Boost includes important fixes from mods like ModernFix and Memory Leak Fix to prevent crashes, reduce lag spikes, and provide a more stable gaming experience.

- **Simple Customization:**

Adjust and manage settings easily using configuration tools such as YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) and Cloth Config API, making it simple for players to fine-tune their game.

- **Pre-Installed Dependencies:**

Vixit Boost comes with all the required dependencies already included, ensuring the modpack works smoothly while delivering strong performance and improved visuals right after installation.

# **Owned by :**

- **Youtube** - VixitPlays ( [Click Here](https://youtube.com/@vixitplays?si=7rr4snrHj1EcxNFy) )
